description.value:
Skill Path: Workshop

More businessman than craftsman you get the best out of your workshop and it's employees.

While developing your skills in Crafting you chose to focus specifically on Workshop, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.CwGMDf0akn0VbNPb]{Vicious Critique}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.K3Pgj5z9OpLFzxgt]{Cooperative Crafting}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{Earn Income}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{Craft}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.CwGMDf0akn0VbNPb]{Vicious Critique}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.K3Pgj5z9OpLFzxgt]{Cooperative Crafting}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.XR95taODq1sq82Du]{Inventor}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.lUXVmSFJbaPos5pY]{Communal Crafting}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.HBosqD4ijMVTflCt]{Master of Apprentice}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.v62QzTwHOT3t86cL]{Craft Anything}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.VRCBTEyrcBf7auGz]{Legendary Tattoo Artist}
